name: newspulse-root
description: NewsPulse - AI-Powered Fake News Detection (Root Config)

scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:ml
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "cd backend && npm test -- --watch" "cd frontend && npm test -- --watch"
scripts.coverage:all: npm run coverage:backend && npm run coverage:frontend && npm run coverage:ml
scripts.coverage:backend: cd backend && npm test -- --coverage && echo 'Backend coverage generated'
scripts.coverage:frontend: cd frontend && npm run test:coverage && echo 'Frontend coverage generated'
scripts.coverage:ml: cd ml_model && pytest --cov=. --cov-report=html && echo 'ML coverage generated'
scripts.setup:tests: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:ml
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npm install --save-dev jest supertest
scripts.setup:frontend: cd frontend && npm install --save-dev vitest @vitest/ui @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom jsdom
scripts.setup:ml: cd ml_model && pip install pytest pytest-asyncio httpx pytest-cov pytest-timeout
scripts.report:tests: npm run coverage:all && npm run coverage:html
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd ml_model && python main.py"
scripts.health: npm run health:backend && npm run health:frontend && npm run health:ml
scripts.reset:tests: npm run clean:tests && npm run setup:tests
